instructions: Write your email using all the notes.

task.subject: Mum’s birthday present
task.initialEmail: Hi,||It’s Mum’s birthday next week, and I think we should buy her a present together. [1]Do you think flowers are a good idea?[/1]||[2]How much money can you spend?[/2] I don’t want the present to be too expensive.||[3]Where should we buy it?[/3] There are several shops in town.||[4]Can you come shopping with me on Thursday?[/4]||Let me know||Harry

sampleAnswer.text: Hi Harry,||Thanks for your email. [1]I don’t think flowers are the best idea, but maybe we could buy Mum a new bag because she needs one for work.[/1]||[2]I can spend about fifteen pounds. I think that should be enough if we share the cost.[/2]||[3]We should buy the present in the shopping centre because there are lots of different shops there.[/3]||[4]I’m sorry, but I can’t come shopping on Thursday because I have a music lesson after school. Could we go on Friday instead?[/4]||See you later,||Olivia
